explanation: This command uses [Type]::GetTypeFromCLSID with a known CLSID from the Sigma rule. It is a direct test of the detection logic and uses standard PowerShell syntax.

This command uses a CLSID from the Sigma rule and appends | Out-Null to suppress output. It demonstrates how the command can be altered to avoid unnecessary output while still triggering the detection.
This command adds additional pipeline elements to demonstrate reordering and insertion techniques. The command remains functionally equivalent but is slightly more obfuscated.
This command uses a CLSID from the Sigma rule without additional output suppression or redirection. It is a minimal test command that still triggers the detection.
This command uses a CLSID from the Sigma rule and includes Out-Null to suppress output. It is a clean test command that avoids unnecessary side effects.
